_comment: v2 2026-06-15. Broad Bash + Write allow so the agent can run compound/heredoc Python (cd && HF_HOME=.. python ..) and write outputs. SAFETY IS THE DENY LIST (deny is evaluated before allow and ALWAYS wins, every mode). Destructive forms blocked in both leading and mid-pipeline positions: rm/rmdir/mv/dd/mkfs/shred/truncate, curl/wget (exfil + unreviewed pull), git push / reset --hard / clean, recursive chmod/chown. Manifest in-place overwrite blocked via both Write/Edit path-deny AND Bash redirect-deny (a merge must be a NEW file the human swaps). Engine source (/workspace/memit_dry_run/**) and covariance_caches Write/Edit-denied — the agent may PATCH the engine via 'patch -p0' (a Bash op, allowed, NOT a Write/Edit) under isolation discipline, but cannot freely overwrite engine files. NOTE: Bash-level deny patterns are best-effort against obfuscation; the real containment is that this pod is a working tier with a durable SSD mirror elsewhere. Keep the supervised-first-run discipline.
